positive: A stylized, vibrant illustration of a glowing celestial compass, depicted with intricate filigree patterns and etched lines, set against a deep midnight blue nebula background. The compass floats centrally, casting soft, ethereal neon light that illuminates orbiting constellations and mystical geometric patterns. The style is neo-art deco with a modern vaporwave aesthetic, emphasizing strong outlines and graphic contrast. Composition should be perfectly symmetrical, focusing on clean silhouettes and high contrast between the illuminated gold compass and the dark cosmic background. Use a restricted palette of sapphire blues, glowing cyan, electric purple, and metallic gold. Perfect for a repeating, centered apparel print.
